summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Rina Visuals photography website. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI loads properly with all key pages and features working. Minor issues found with booking calendar date selection and admin dashboard loading state.

ui_bugs.issue: Date selection not working - all dates appear disabled or calendar component not responding to clicks
ui_bugs.selector: Calendar component in Step 1 of booking flow

ui_bugs.issue: Admin dashboard shows loading spinner indefinitely when accessing with session token

integration_issues.issue: No visible error message shown when invalid credentials are entered

design_issues.issue: Website follows warm color scheme (beige/cream/gold) as requested

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, services preview, portfolio preview, testimonials
Navigation works - all links (Home, Portfolio, Services, Book Now, About, Contact, Admin)
Portfolio page loads with category filter buttons and image gallery
Portfolio filtering works (All, Wedding, Birthday, Corporate, Photobooth)
Services page loads with Photography and Photobooth tabs and packages
Contact page loads with functional form
Login page loads with email/password form and Google OAuth button
Register page loads with registration form
User registration and login flow works via API
All backend API endpoints working: GET /api/packages, GET /api/portfolio, GET /api/booked-dates, POST /api/bookings, POST /api/contact
Admin API endpoints accessible with proper permissions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix booking calendar date selection functionality and admin dashboard loading issues. Calendar may need to show future dates properly and handle user interaction. Admin dashboard authentication flow needs to work with session tokens.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Most UI features working, 2 medium priority issues found
